decision_commentary: Required documents correctly identified for Los Cabos coastal site: escritura, predial, topographic survey, SEMARNAT coastal zone clearance, and municipal use-of-land permit. Blockers documented: SEMARNAT clearance timeline (4-8 weeks) and topographic survey not yet commissioned.
